package rulecoverage

func NegativeSuccessResponseContainsErrorFieldOrMixedContract() string {
    ruleID := "success_response_contains_error_field_or_mixed_contract"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Endpoints that blend success and error shapes into one ambiguous contract."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
